overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character exploring a dark gothic castle interior. The character walks through torch-lit vaulted corridors, passes suits of armor, and ascends a grand staircase in a majestic hall filled with other students, reaching an upper landing with ornate wooden doors.

events.description: passing through stone archway from small room into corridor

agents.ego_description: walking toward and through an ornate wooden doorway into a corridor

entered.detail: large carved wooden door with metal studs and arched top
lit wall-mounted torch sconce with metal bracket
ornate stone balustrade along elevated walkway
gothic pointed stone archway leading to corridor
tall arched window with colored glass panes
wall-mounted torch providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a small dimly lit antechamber facing an ornate wooden door. After passing through a stone archway, the scene opens into a corridor with stained glass windows on the left and torch sconces on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: long gothic corridor with vaulted ceiling

events.description: passing suits of armor standing against the stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a long corridor with vaulted ceilings and torch lighting

entered.detail: ornate ribbed stone vaulting with decorative bosses
thick cylindrical stone pillar supporting the ceiling
full suit of medieval armor standing against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a long gothic corridor with a high vaulted ceiling supported by stone columns. Torch sconces provide warm lighting along the walls, and suits of armor stand guard against the stone walls.

events.description: beginning to ascend the stone staircase to upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing a narrow stone staircase with wall lanterns

entered.detail: wide stone steps with worn edges leading upward
enclosed metal lantern mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a stone staircase illuminated by wall lanterns, moving from the lower corridor to an upper level. The stone archway of the corridor remains visible behind as the character climbs.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with massive staircase

events.description: entering the grand hall revealing a massive bifurcated staircase
approaching the central statue at the base of the grand staircase

agents.ego_description: entering the grand hall and approaching the main staircase among other students

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking up the right side of the staircase
student standing near the balcony railing

entered.detail: massive bifurcated stone staircase with red carpet runner
large stone statue on pedestal in the center of the hall
elaborate iron chandelier hanging from the high ceiling
ornate stone balustrade along the upper level
very tall arched windows with diamond-patterned glass

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast grand hall dominated by a massive bifurcated staircase. A central statue stands at the base, and a large chandelier hangs overhead. Other students in robes walk about the space, some ascending the stairs.

events.description: beginning to ascend the grand staircase alongside other students

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand staircase alongside other students in robes

notable_agents.action: student walking up the stairs ahead on the right side
student ascending the left side of the staircase

entered.detail: portraits in gilded frames hanging on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand staircase, passing framed portraits on the walls. The chandelier hangs closer overhead, and other students climb alongside. The central statue and lower hall recede below.

events.description: reaching the top landing and leveling out
approaching the large wooden doors at the end of the landing

agents.ego_description: walking across the upper landing toward the large wooden doors

notable_agents.action: student in robes walking toward the camera across the landing

entered.detail: massive double doors with geometric paneling and metal handles
suit of armor flanking the left side of the doors
suit of armor flanking the right side of the doors
decorative patterned carpet on the floor before the doors

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the grand staircase and walks across the upper landing. Two suits of armor flank a massive set of wooden doors ahead. The chandelier now hangs high above, and the character approaches the doors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, secluded antechamber into the expansive, bustling heart of a gothic castle. It begins by passing through a stone archway and into a vaulted corridor where stained glass windows and torch sconces cast a warm glow over silent suits of armor. As the character ascends a lantern-lit stone staircase, the narrow hallway gives way to a vast grand hall dominated by a massive bifurcated staircase, a central statue, and a towering overhead chandelier. The camera then climbs the grand stairs past framed portraits and other robed students, causing the lower hall to recede into the distance. Finally, the movement concludes on an upper landing, passing two flanking suits of armor to approach a set of massive wooden doors.
